org.apache.juneau.http.header.ProxyAuthorization.Builder

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.

  • Uses of ProxyAuthorization.Builder in org.apache.juneau.http.header

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.algorithm(String value)
    Sets the algorithm auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
    static ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.basic(String user, String password)
    Creates a ProxyAuthorization.Builder pre-populated with Basic credentials (base64 of user:password).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.basic(String user, String password)
    Sets Basic credentials by base64-encoding user:password as the token68 form.
    static ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.bearer(String token)
    Creates a ProxyAuthorization.Builder pre-populated with Bearer credentials.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.bearer(String token)
    Sets Bearer credentials with the supplied token as the token68 form.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.cnonce(String value)
    Sets the cnonce auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    static ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.create()
    Creates a new empty ProxyAuthorization.Builder.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.digest()
    Sets the scheme to Digest (typed Digest auth-params can then be chained).
    static ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.digest()
    Creates a ProxyAuthorization.Builder pre-populated with a Digest scheme.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.nc(String value)
    Sets the nc (nonce-count) auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.nonce(String value)
    Sets the nonce auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.opaque(String value)
    Sets the opaque auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.param(String name, String value)
    Generic escape hatch for setting any auth-param by name, rendered as a quoted-string.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.qop(String value)
    Sets the qop auth-param (rendered as a bare token, unquoted; a single value in credentials).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.realm(String value)
    Sets the realm auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.response(String value)
    Sets the response auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.scheme(String value)
    Sets the authentication scheme (e.g.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.token(String value)
    Sets the opaque token68 credentials form, clearing any auth-params.
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.uri(String value)
    Sets the uri auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder
    ProxyAuthorization.Builder.username(String value)
    Sets the username auth-param (rendered as a quoted-string).
